description: Curated module bundles for common project shapes. Pass the matching modules list to `claude plugin install dhpk@dhpk --plugin-option modules=<csv>`. The interactive installer (`scripts/install.sh`) exposes these as quick presets. Module identifiers MUST exist in `manifests/module-catalog.json` (the SSOT); profiles here are convenience aliases, not new modules.

minimal.description: Generic core only — no language/framework modules. Suitable for any project; gets the review hooks, openspec/codex/git workflow skills, and harness scripts.

legacy-php-yii.description: PHP 5.6 + Yii 1.1 + PHPUnit 5.7 stack. Activates all three modules at once for full Yii-1.1 path-trigger coverage and AR/CDbCriteria guidance.

php-only.description: PHP 5.6 baseline without Yii or PHPUnit. Useful for PHP projects not on Yii.

full.description: Every module shipped in this plugin version enabled.
